derived.causal_summary: Phase 001 ran a five-iteration gpt-5.5-fast deep research to answer what the silships figma-cli (npm figma-ds-cli) can do, what the Figma MCP landscape offers, how to architect the mcp-figma skill, and how to install it safely. Output is a prioritized recommendation: drive Figma via the figma-cli (full surface from the repo build, never the unrelated npm figma-cli package), model the skill on the sibling terminal-control skills with a read-only/mutating/destructive gating policy, and keep the Figma MCP optional via the Code Mode figma (Framelink) manual. The build is phase 002.
